costCurve.milestone: Early research prototype — university and lab deployments only
costCurve._note: Midpoint of $150,000-$500,000 prototype range cited in ROBOT summary

costCurve.milestone: Early commercial pilots — initial enterprise deployments; 40% cost reduction from 2023 peak
Longbow Systems (Unitree equivalent) G1 at $13,500 establishes Chinese commodity price floor
costCurve._note: Unitree G1 exact price $13,500; R1 model at $5,600. Using $13,500 as the G1 datapoint.

costCurve.milestone: Solid-state battery integration emerging; rare-earth-free motor designs reduce BOM. Western firms reach $15,000-$50,000 range.
costCurve._note: Midpoint of $15,000-$50,000 Western manufacturer 2028 target range

costCurve.milestone: Commodity scale threshold crossed — mass-market target $15,000-$30,000. Wave 2 commercial deployment (semi-structured environments) enabled.
Scale manufacturing; BOM optimisation. Commodity-scale target $10,000-$15,000. Fewer than 20 companies survive Gartner-projected shakeout.
costCurve._note: Midpoint of $10,000-$15,000 commodity-scale 2032+ range; Gartner forecast cited in ROBOT summary

costCurve.milestone: Wave 3 domestic and medical deployment unlocked. 1.4 million annual unit shipments projected (analyst estimate). Total addressable market reaches $38 billion.
costCurve._note: Cost extrapolated from trend; $38B TAM and 1.4M units/year are analyst projections in ROBOT summary

keyConstraints._note: 200-500 hour hand maintenance interval vs 50,000+ hours for traditional industrial arms — a 100x reliability gap

marketProjections._note: SSB demand growth represents 1,000x increase in one decade per TrendForce forecast
